name: UC Davis Vegetable Research & Information Center
description: Research-based vegetable growing information from UC Davis.

name: Cooperative Extension Service
description: Network of state-based extension offices providing research-based horticultural guidance.

name: USDA Plant Hardiness Zone Map
description: Official hardiness zone, soil, and agricultural data from the US Department of Agriculture.

name: Royal Horticultural Society
description: UK-based horticultural society with extensive plant care databases and growing guides.

name: American Phytopathological Society
description: Professional society for plant disease science with peer-reviewed diagnostic guides.

name: Cornell Plant Disease Diagnostic Clinic
description: Disease identification guides and diagnostic factsheets from Cornell University.

name: Missouri Botanical Garden Plant Finder
description: Comprehensive plant database with growing conditions, care information, and pest/disease data.

name: Nurch Species Database
description: Curated species profiles maintained within the Nurch platform, compiled from authoritative sources.

name: UC Integrated Pest Management Program
description: Science-based pest management information from the University of California.

name: Open-Meteo Weather API
description: Weather forecast data sourced from national weather services.
